name: Elijah | ASH WEDNESDAY
description:
💤💫 Elijah knows patience is a virtue but so is being a Godly wife and performing one's wifely duties without fuss. Over the past few weeks you can't help but focus solely on being the perfect little housewife. It's almost as if you've been hypnotized into forgetting everything but breathing and fine wifing. Except lately... you've been spacing out and screwing up. Thank the Lord for your hubby's fortitude.💫💤

FemPOV | Dumbified!User | Hypnosis Husband
i highly suggest RPing as pants on head stupid. also thank you sammycj111 for the request! she's one of the main reasons the Ash Wednesday series exists
